---
title: "Construction Cost Control Features | Real-Time Tracking & AI Insights | Praevius"
pagetitle: "Construction Cost Control Features | Real-Time Tracking & AI Insights | Praevius"
description: "Real-time budget tracking, AI-powered variance reports, S-curve forecasting, change order management, and progress claim automation. Complete construction cost control features."
keywords: "construction cost tracking features, real-time budget tracking, AI variance reports, S-curve forecasting, change order management, progress claim automation"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="canonical" href="https://praevius.app/features.html" />
          <!-- BreadcrumbList Schema -->
          <script type="application/ld+json">
          {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
            "itemListElement": [
              {
                "@type": "ListItem",
                "position": 1,
                "name": "Home",
                "item": "https://praevius.app/"
              },
              {
                "@type": "ListItem",
                "position": 2,
                "name": "Features",
                "item": "https://praevius.app/features.html"
              }
            ]
          }
          </script>
      - text: |
          <!-- FAQPage Schema -->
          <script type="application/ld+json">
          {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "FAQPage",
            "mainEntity": [
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "What is AI-powered cost reporting for construction?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "AI-powered cost reporting uses artificial intelligence to generate professional variance reports from natural language requests. In Praevius, you ask for the report you need in plain English — for example, 'Generate variance report for Project Alpha' — and receive a complete report with plain English explanations of cost drivers, trend analysis, and executive summaries in minutes instead of hours. Available on Professional tier and above."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "What integrations does Praevius support?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Praevius integrates with Xero, QuickBooks, and Sage for accounting; Google Drive, SharePoint, and OneDrive for cloud storage; and Procore for general contractor collaboration (Scale plan). Essential plan includes 1 accounting integration plus Google Drive. Professional and Scale plans include all integrations. An open API is available for custom connections."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "How does construction variance tracking work?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Praevius monitors the difference between budgeted and actual project costs in real time. When costs deviate from the baseline, the traffic light system flags it immediately: green (within ±5%), yellow (5-10% variance), red (over 10%). The system calculates Cost Performance Index (CPI) live and AI-generated reports explain root causes and suggest corrective actions."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "Can I use voice commands on a construction site?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Yes. Praevius supports natural language voice input designed for noisy construction environments. Speak commands like 'Show me Project Alpha status' or 'Approve the variation' for hands-free cost control in the field. All voice actions are permission-aware with confirmation for critical operations."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "What is Earned Value Management (EVM) in construction?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Earned Value Management is a project management methodology that integrates scope, schedule, and cost to measure project performance. Praevius implements EVM through S-curve forecasting, tracking planned vs. actual vs. forecast cost curves, calculating Schedule Performance Index (SPI) and Cost Performance Index (CPI), and projecting Estimate at Completion (EAC). What-if scenario modelling helps plan interventions before problems escalate."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "How does construction change order management work?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Change orders (variations) account for 8-14% of project costs. Praevius tracks every variation from inception to approval to payment through a complete variation register with status tracking, automated entitlement flagging, impact assessment and pricing tools, and approval workflow automation. This ensures no revenue is left on the table."
                }
              },
              {
                "@type": "Question",
                "name": "What is progress claim automation?",
                "acceptedAnswer": {
                  "@type": "Answer",
                  "text": "Progress claim automation eliminates the manual process of creating payment applications. Praevius calculates percentage complete from your budget data, tracks retainage and retention, maintains a full audit trail, and exports claims in multiple contract formats including UK JCT, Australian SOPA, and US AIA G702/G703. What used to take hours of spreadsheet work takes minutes."
                }
              }
            ]
          }
          </script>
      - text: |
          <!-- HowTo Schema -->
          <script type="application/ld+json">
          {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "HowTo",
            "name": "How to Track Construction Costs with Praevius",
            "description": "Set up AI-powered cost tracking for your construction projects in three steps.",
            "step": [
              {
                "@type": "HowToStep",
                "position": 1,
                "name": "Connect Your Data",
                "text": "Link Praevius to your accounting software (Xero, QuickBooks, or Sage) and cloud storage (Google Drive, SharePoint). Your budget and actual cost data syncs automatically."
              },
              {
                "@type": "HowToStep",
                "position": 2,
                "name": "Ask for Insights",
                "text": "Use natural language or voice commands to request reports, check project health, or approve variations. For example: 'Show me projects over budget' or 'Generate variance report for Project Alpha'."
              },
              {
                "@type": "HowToStep",
                "position": 3,
                "name": "Act on AI Insights",
                "text": "Review AI-generated variance reports with plain English explanations, S-curve forecasts showing project trajectory, and traffic light status indicators. Take corrective action before cost overruns escalate."
              }
            ]
          }
          </script>
---

<!-- Hero Section -->
<div class="hero-section full-width" style="padding: 4rem 2rem;">
<div class="container">

# Construction Cost Control Features: <span class="highlight">Real-Time Tracking & AI Insights</span>

<p class="tagline">From real-time tracking to AI-powered forecasting. One platform, complete visibility.</p>

</div>
</div>

<!-- AI Assistant Section -->
<div class="section section-light">
<div class="container">

<h2 class="section-title">Your <span>AI Assistant</span></h2>

<p class="text-center mb-4" style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 2rem;">
No menus to learn. No training required. Just tell Praevius what you need in plain English—or speak it on site.
</p>

<div class="grid-2" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div class="feature-card">
<h3 style="color: var(--praevius-orange); margin-bottom: 1rem;">Just Ask</h3>
<ul style="color: #757575; list-style: none; padding: 0; line-height: 2;">
<li>"Show me projects over budget"</li>
<li>"Generate variance report for Project Alpha"</li>
<li>"What's the CPI on the hospital job?"</li>
<li>"Approve the steel variation"</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="feature-card">
<h3 style="color: var(--praevius-orange); margin-bottom: 1rem;">AI Handles the Rest</h3>
<ul style="color: #757575; list-style: none; padding: 0; line-height: 2;">
<li><i class="bi bi-check text-orange"></i> Instant dashboards & reports</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-check text-orange"></i> Voice commands from the field</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-check text-orange"></i> Permission-aware actions</li>
<li><i class="bi bi-check text-orange"></i> Confirmation for critical tasks</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- Core Features -->
<div class="section section-light">
<div class="container">

<h2 class="section-title">Core <span>Capabilities</span></h2>

<div class="grid-2">

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-bar-chart-line"></i> Real-Time Budget Tracking</h3>
<p>See your budget vs. actual costs the moment data changes. No more waiting for month-end reports to discover problems. Dashboard views show project health at a glance with traffic-light status indicators.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Live cost performance index (CPI)</li>
<li>Budget consumption tracking</li>
<li>Variance alerts and thresholds</li>
<li>Multi-project portfolio view</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" id="ai-reporting">
<h3><i class="bi bi-robot"></i> AI-Powered Reporting</h3>
<p>Just ask for the report you need—the AI handles the rest. Generate professional variance reports in minutes, not hours. Plain English explanations of the "why" behind your numbers.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Automated variance explanations</li>
<li>Trend analysis and forecasting</li>
<li>Executive summary generation</li>
<li>Export to PDF, Word, or share live</li>
</ul>
<p style="margin-top: 1rem;"><a href="pricing.html">AI Reports available on Professional tier and above</a></p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i> S-Curve Forecasting</h3>
<p>Earned Value Management made practical. See where your project is headed, not just where it's been. Plan interventions before problems escalate.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Planned vs. actual vs. forecast curves</li>
<li>Schedule Performance Index (SPI)</li>
<li>Estimate at Completion (EAC) projections</li>
<li>What-if scenario modeling</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" id="change-orders">
<h3><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-diff"></i> Change Order Management</h3>
<p>Track every variation from inception to approval to payment with our dedicated <strong>change order management</strong> system. Never leave money on the table again. Change orders account for 8-14% of project costs—capture them all.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Complete variation register with status tracking</li>
<li>Automated entitlement flagging</li>
<li>Impact assessment and pricing tools</li>
<li>Approval workflow automation</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" id="progress-claims">
<h3><i class="bi bi-receipt"></i> Construction Progress Claim Software</h3>
<p>Generate accurate <strong>progress claims</strong> in minutes, not hours. Our <strong>progress claim automation</strong> eliminates the manual process of hunting through spreadsheets, recalculating percentages, and rechecking every line item.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Percentage complete calculations with audit trail</li>
<li>Retainage and retention tracking</li>
<li>Claim history and documentation</li>
<li>Multi-format export (UK JCT, AU SOPA, US AIA)</li>
</ul>
<p style="margin-top: 1rem;"><a href="pricing.html">View pricing for progress claim features</a></p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" id="schedule-of-values">
<h3><i class="bi bi-table"></i> Schedule of Values</h3>
<p>Client billing structures often differ from internal cost codes. SOV management bridges this gap with many-to-many mapping between your WBS and client billing formats.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Multi-format support (UK JCT/NEC, US AIA G702/G703, AU SOPA)</li>
<li>Cost code to SOV line mapping</li>
<li>Payment application tracking</li>
<li>Progress sync from budget data</li>
</ul>
<p style="margin-top: 1rem;"><a href="pricing.html">Schedule of Values available on Scale tier</a></p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-plug"></i> Seamless Integrations</h3>
<p>Connect to the tools you already use. Praevius syncs with accounting, storage, and project management platforms for a single source of truth.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Xero, QuickBooks, Sage</li>
<li>Google Drive, SharePoint, OneDrive</li>
<li>Procore (for GC collaboration)</li>
<li>Open API for custom connections</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-mic"></i> Voice Commands</h3>
<p>Speak your requests on the jobsite. "Show me Project Alpha" or "Approve the variation"—hands-free cost control that works in noisy environments.</p>
<ul style="color: #757575; margin-top: 1rem;">
<li>Natural language processing</li>
<li>Works in noisy environments</li>
<li>Field-ready voice input</li>
<li>Permission-aware actions</li>
</ul>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- Coming Soon -->
<div class="section section-gray">
<div class="container">

<h2 class="section-title">Coming <span>Soon</span></h2>

<div class="grid-2" style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-phone"></i> Native Mobile App</h3>
<p>Beyond responsive web—a true native experience. Offline capability, camera integration for documentation, push notifications for approvals.</p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card">
<h3><i class="bi bi-lightbulb"></i> Predictive Analytics</h3>
<p>AI that learns from your historical data to predict likely cost overruns before they happen. Early warning, not post-mortem.</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- Traffic Light System -->
<div class="section section-light">
<div class="container">

<h2 class="section-title">Industry-Standard <span>Variance Indicators</span></h2>

<p class="text-center mb-4" style="max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto 3rem;">
Instant project health visibility using the traffic light system every construction professional understands.
</p>

<div class="grid-3">

<div class="feature-card" style="border-left-color: #10B981;">
<span class="badge badge-green" style="font-size: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-check-circle"></i> On Budget</span>
<p class="mt-2">Variance within +/-5%. Project performing as planned. Continue current trajectory.</p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" style="border-left-color: #F59E0B;">
<span class="badge badge-yellow" style="font-size: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i> Watch</span>
<p class="mt-2">Variance 5-10%. Early warning. Investigate and plan corrective action.</p>
</div>

<div class="feature-card" style="border-left-color: #EF4444;">
<span class="badge badge-red" style="font-size: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 2rem;"><i class="bi bi-x-circle"></i> Over Budget</span>
<p class="mt-2">Variance exceeds 10%. Immediate attention required. Intervention needed.</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- FAQ Section -->
<div class="section section-gray">
<div class="container">

<h2 class="section-title">Frequently Asked <span>Questions</span></h2>

<div style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>What is AI-powered cost reporting for construction?</h3>
<p>AI-powered cost reporting uses artificial intelligence to generate professional variance reports from natural language requests. In Praevius, you ask for the report you need in plain English — for example, "Generate variance report for Project Alpha" — and receive a complete report with plain English explanations of cost drivers, trend analysis, and executive summaries in minutes instead of hours. Available on Professional tier and above.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>What integrations does Praevius support?</h3>
<p>Praevius integrates with Xero, QuickBooks, and Sage for accounting; Google Drive, SharePoint, and OneDrive for cloud storage; and Procore for general contractor collaboration (Scale plan). Essential plan includes 1 accounting integration plus Google Drive. Professional and Scale plans include all integrations. An open API is available for custom connections.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>How does construction variance tracking work?</h3>
<p>Praevius monitors the difference between budgeted and actual project costs in real time. When costs deviate from the baseline, the traffic light system flags it immediately: green (within ±5%), yellow (5-10% variance), red (over 10%). The system calculates Cost Performance Index (CPI) live and AI-generated reports explain root causes and suggest corrective actions.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>Can I use voice commands on a construction site?</h3>
<p>Yes. Praevius supports natural language voice input designed for noisy construction environments. Speak commands like "Show me Project Alpha status" or "Approve the variation" for hands-free cost control in the field. All voice actions are permission-aware with confirmation for critical operations.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>What is Earned Value Management (EVM) in construction?</h3>
<p>Earned Value Management is a project management methodology that integrates scope, schedule, and cost to measure project performance. Praevius implements EVM through S-curve forecasting, tracking planned vs. actual vs. forecast cost curves, calculating Schedule Performance Index (SPI) and Cost Performance Index (CPI), and projecting Estimate at Completion (EAC). What-if scenario modelling helps plan interventions before problems escalate.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>How does construction change order management work?</h3>
<p>Change orders (variations) account for 8-14% of project costs. Praevius tracks every variation from inception to approval to payment through a complete variation register with status tracking, automated entitlement flagging, impact assessment and pricing tools, and approval workflow automation. This ensures no revenue is left on the table.</p>
</div>

<div class="faq-item">
<h3>What is progress claim automation?</h3>
<p>Progress claim automation eliminates the manual process of creating payment applications. Praevius calculates percentage complete from your budget data, tracks retainage and retention, maintains a full audit trail, and exports claims in multiple contract formats including UK JCT, Australian SOPA, and US AIA G702/G703. What used to take hours of spreadsheet work takes minutes.</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="section section-dark">
<div class="container text-center">

<h2 class="section-title" style="color: white;">Ready to Take <span>Control?</span></h2>

<p style="color: #F0F0F0; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Start your free trial and experience all features. <a href="contact.html" style="color: #FF9900;">Request a demo</a> or <a href="about.html" style="color: #FF9900;">learn about our team</a>.</p>

<a href="https://app.praevius.app/start-trial?bundle=professional" class="btn btn-primary"><i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Start Free Trial</a>

</div>
</div>
